name: Dance And Masti Dharam Ji Style
desc: The Dharam Ji celebration continues in Gokuldham as the members share interesting facts and trivia about the legendary actor, while also dancing and singing his famous songs.

name: Quiz Show On Dharam Ji
desc: The program continues with the society members dressing up as Dharmendra ji from his iconic films. Later, they come together to play a quiz based on Dharam ji and his memorable career.

name: Dharamaji Ki Yaadon Ki Baarat
desc: In memory of the late actor Dharmendra, the Gokuldham colony celebrates New Year's Eve, joined by Sanket Gokhale.

name: Yaadon Ka Pitara
desc: Champaklal reminisces about his younger days with Tapu and Jethalal and recalls legendary actor Dharmendra. Later, the other members also share their memories of the late actor Dharmendra.

name: Another Trouble For Champaklal
desc: Inspector Pandey suspects Champaklal was attempting suicide, creating another problem for him. Later, Nanji Kaka arrives to meet Champaklal. Will he learn about the tree incident?

name: Dadaji Ko Neeche Utaro Mission
desc: Tapu calls the Dahi Handi team to help bring Champaklal down from the tree. Will this plan work?

name: The Snake Charmer
desc: Abdul calls a snake charmer to rescue Champaklal by catching the snake. But will this solution create more problems instead?

name: Bapuji Ko Kaise Bachaye?
desc: Trapped in a tree, Bapuji faces fresh danger as a snake slithers towards him. Can the colony members rescue him in time?

name: Snake Attack
desc: The Gokuldham members bring ladders and tie them together to help Champaklal get down, but he spots a snake on the tree. How will he come down now?

name: Bagha To The Rescue
desc: The Gokuldham members devise a plan to bring Champaklal down and turn to Bagha for help. Will he find a solution?

name: Champaklal Ko Neeche Laane Ki Koshish
desc: The entire society gathers at the park to support Champaklal and bring him food, while Tapu and Gogi look for a way to help him get down. How will they manage it?

name: Champaklal Chadhe Pedh Par
desc: Champaklal climbs a tree to help a child retrieve his kite but gets stuck. How will Tapu Sena and the others bring him down safely?

name: Champaklal Hue Gayab
desc: The search for Champaklal continues as the Gokuldham members circulate his photo and ask around about his whereabouts. Where has Champaklal gone?

name: Searching For Champaklal
desc: Tapu Sena sets out to search for Champaklal and later informs Bhide and Popatlal. Will they be able to find him?

name: Waiting For Champaklal
desc: Jethalal scolds Bagha and Nattu Kaka for calling him to work early, while Tapu keeps Nanji Kaka entertained at home as they wait for Champaklal. But where has Champaklal gone?

name: Zumba Session For Champaklal And Friends
desc: Champaklal and his friends enjoy a Zumba session at the park. Meanwhile, Jethalal waits for Tapu and Champaklal to return as he needs to leave for the office. Later, one of Champaklal's friends arrives at the house and finds it locked.

name: Importance Of Exercising
desc: The Gokuldham men tease Popatlal for feeling cold. Later, Champaklal insists on taking Jethalal out for exercise. Will Jethalal agree?

name: Popatlal Ko Lagi Thand
desc: Abdul, Ratan and Dr Hathi discuss putting the gold cycle behind them. Later, Sodhi plays a prank on Popatlal when he complains of feeling cold.

name: Gokuldham Ka Teamwork
desc: Gokuldham celebrates Abdul's return, but curiosity grows over how Chunnilal got the gold cycle. What new secret will come to light?

name: Abdul Aur Cycle Ki Adla Badli
desc: Chunnilal gets the cycle and the Gokuldham members get Abdul. Before they can escape, they trick the gang. Will they manage to get away with the cycle?

name: Chunnilal Ka Foolproof Plan
desc: Chunnilal's men trick the Gokuldham members, blindfold them, and take them to an isolated location. Meanwhile, the others pray for their safety. Will the Gokuldham members outsmart Chunnilal and his gang?

name: Rescuing Abdul
desc: Gokuldham members head out with the cycle to rescue Abdul at the spot Chunnilal mentioned, while the rest of the society anxiously waits back home. What unfolds next?

name: Abdul Held Hostage
desc: Gokuldham members come together to plan Abdul's rescue in exchange for the cycle, while Abdul remains held at a remote spot. How will they manage to bring him back safely?

name: Abdul Gets Kidnapped
desc: Chunnilal and his men kidnap Abdul and demand the gold cycle in exchange. Will the Gokuldham members give up the cycle to save him?

name: Chunnilal Barges Into Gokuldham
desc: Chunnilal storms into Gokuldham with his men and tries to take the cycle at gunpoint. How will the society deal with this threat?

name: Abdul Bana Crorepati
desc: Abdul and the society celebrate his newfound fortune after discovering the gold cycle. While everyone enjoys taking a ride, Chunnilal hatches a plan to slip into Gokuldham and reclaim the cycle.

name: Sone Ki Cycle
desc: The society members are stunned to discover that the cycle is made of gold. Will Chunnilal come up with yet another plan to steal it?

name: Tapu Sena Ki Smartness
desc: Using their quick thinking, Tapu Sena swaps Abdul's cycle, leaving Chunnilal annoyed when he realises he stole the wrong one. Later, while trying to remove the mark from the cycle, they uncover something unexpected. What could it be?

name: Abdul Ki Cycle Hui Chori
desc: Chunnilal manages to steal the cycle, leaving Bhide and Abdul stunned. How will they get it back now?

name: Cycle Ki Chori
desc: Chunnilal finally puts his plan into motion and heads to Gokuldham Colony to steal the cycle. Will the society members be able to save it in time?

name: Protecting The Cycle
desc: Suspicion around the cycle keeps growing in the society, and everyone tries to protect it. Meanwhile, Chunnilal comes up with a new plan to steal it. What happens next?

name: Popatlal Ki Condition
desc: Just as Chunnilal is about to take the cycle out of the society he runs into Popatlal. Popatlal lays down a condition before he will allow Chunnilal to take it. What will Chunnilal do?

name: Cycle Se Emotional Attachment
desc: While Champaklal raises a solid point about the cycle, Chunnilal Talatode arrives in Gokuldham disguised as Dinesh Ghoda. What is he plotting now?

name: Rustom Ghantiwala Ka Inspection
desc: The Gokuldham members head out to meet Rustom to uncover the truth about the cycle. Meanwhile, Chunnilal makes his plan to reclaim it. What happens when their paths collide?

name: Cycle Ki Kundli
desc: Ratan tells a story while everyone keeps wondering what's really special about the cycle. Later, Roshan suggests getting it checked by her uncle. What will they discover about the cycle now?

name: Cycle Ka Raaz
desc: Babu Chipke assures everyone in Gokuldham that the cycle is nothing extraordinary. Still, the members grow curious and try to uncover its secret, while Chunnilal thinks of a way to snatch it.

name: Gadhe Ke Nishaan Waali Cycle
desc: The society members can't stop discussing the huge offer Abdul received for his cycle. Later, they call Babu Chipke to inspect it. What will he discover?

name: Anmol Cycle Anmol Daam
desc: Chunnilal's men offer Abdul an unusually high price for his cycle, raising suspicion. With Abdul refusing to sell, how will they try to take it now?

name: Planning To Bring The Cycle
desc: Chunnilal tries to buy the cycle from Abdul but flees the moment he spots Popatlal. Later, he hatches a plan to sneak into Gokuldham. Will he manage to reclaim his lucky cycle?

name: Chunnilal Ki Cycle
desc: Popatlal meets Chunnilal Talatode outside the jail to take his interview. Later, Chunnilal enquires about his lucky cycle which happens to be with Abdul. How will this turn out?

name: Abdul Ki Cycle
desc: Abdul celebrates with everyone in the society as he completes 500 days with his cycle. Meanwhile, Popatlal gets a call to interview a high profile criminal who is about to be released from jail.

name: Abdul Ka Surprise
desc: Bhide gives Abdul a lesson on saving water. Later, at the shop, Abdul tells everyone he has a surprise waiting for them. What could it be?

name: Popatlal Runs After Bhide
desc: Bhide grows tense as he struggles to find someone to fix the broken glass. Later, Popatlal snaps at him and chases him around the society. What caused his outburst?

name: Iyer And Bhide Apologise
desc: The Mahila Mandal finally admit that they were the ones who broke the window glass, clearing Tapu of all blame. With the truth out, Bhide and Iyer are left embarrassed and now must find a sincere way to apologise to Jethalal.

name: Bhide And Jethalal Present Their Sides
desc: Bhide and Iyer put their side of the story before Inspector Pandey, and Jethalal explains his as well. Soon after, the Mahila Mandal arrives at the police station. Will Madhavi and Babita admit what really happened?

name: Bhide Fights With Jethalal
desc: Bhide and Jethalal get into a fight regarding Tapu and the broken glass, and only Inspector Pandey can control the chaos. Will they resolve the case or confuse Pandey even more?

name: Bhide Ka Gussa
desc: Madhavi and Babita accidentally break the glass of their own house while playing cricket, leaving everyone worried about Bhide's reaction. Meanwhile, Bhide learns about the incident and assumes Tapu is behind it. How will the misunderstanding unfold?

name: Mahila Mandal Plays Cricket
desc: Bhide and Goli collide, causing Tapu's catch to be dropped and the challenge to be lost. Later, the Mahila Mandal decides to join in and play cricket.

name: Tapu Aur Goli Ka Zabardast Challenge
desc: While Tapu Sena enjoys a game of cricket, Veer and Bansri provoke Goli against Tapu, leading him to challenge Tapu. Who will emerge victorious?

name: Champaklal Ne Sunai Saza
desc: Champaklal decides to punish Jethalal and Tapu by announcing that he's leaving for Bhachau. Later, Rupa arrives with food for the Gada family.

name: Jethalal Ki Chori Pakdi Gayi
desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha arrive just in time to hand over another fake receipt to Champaklal, exposing Jethalal and Tapu's lie. How will Jethalal face Champaklal's anger now?

name: Nakli Receipt
desc: Tapu comes up with a plan to help Jethalal by creating a fake receipt and asks him to show it to Champaklal. But will Champaklal see through their plan?

name: The Lost Receipt
desc: Jethalal rushes to his shop to search for the missing receipt but ends up having to pay a fine along the way. With Champaklal calling him repeatedly, how will Jethalal explain the situation about the lost receipt?

name: Jethalal Aur Taarak Ka Struggle
desc: Jethalal pins his hopes on Iyer to find the missing receipt, while Champaklal keeps calling to ask about it. Later, he calls Bagha and Nattu Kaka but none of them respond. Will he find the receipt?

name: Finding The Receipt
desc: After losing the receipt, Jethalal hides from Champaklal in the society and tries to contact the auto driver, hoping he might have left it there. Will Jethalal be able to find the missing receipt?

name: Receipt Kaha Hai?
desc: Jethalal loses the receipt for a payment and panics, knowing he already told Bapuji it was done. Will he find a way out of this mess?

name: Struggle To Get A Cheque
desc: Jethalal visits the bank to request a new cheque book and later sits down to prepare the cheque. But is another hurdle waiting to stop him this time?

name: Vridhashram Ka Cheque
desc: Jethalal deals with a new set of customers at his shop, while Taarak reminds him about handing over the cheque to the old age home. Will Jethalal finally complete the task this time, or will fresh hurdles come his way again?

name: Feku Gada
desc: Champaklal's friends tease him for not donating to the old-age home. Feeling upset, he later talks to Tapu about it. How will Champaklal handle the situation?

name: Scooter Ka Naamkaran
desc: The Binjolas invite Batuk Maharaj to help them name their new scooter. With everyone pitching in ideas, will they finally settle on the perfect name?

name: Binjola Parivaar Ki Meeting
desc: On Babita's request, Iyer offers to drop Jethalal to the office, but his car refuses to start. Later, the entire Binjola family gathers for an important discussion. What big matter are they about to reveal?

name: Popatlal Ka Jadoo
desc: Everyone gathers in the clubhouse, hoping the laddoo box will finally be found. Later, Popatlal performs a magic trick that leaves the members stunned. How will they react to this unexpected surprise?

name: One Box Across The Society
desc: To track down his laddoo box, Popatlal first asks Taarak and then the other members continue questioning each other in the society. Will he discover that his box has been passed around the entire neighbourhood?

name: Laddoo Ka Box
desc: Babita and Iyer give a box of laddoos to the Bhides, the same one that has been secretly circling around the society. When Bhide passes it on to the Sodhi family, will the laddoo box finally find its rightful owner again?

name: Popatlal Ke Ghar Ki Laxmi
desc: A woman named Rambha arrives at Gokuldham Society to meet Popatlal. Could she finally be the girl of Popatlal's dreams?

name: Veer And Bansri Ki Shararat
desc: Veer and Bansri get scolded for bursting crackers in the society compound. Later, the members of Gokuldham society gear up to celebrate the festival of lights with great joy and excitement.

name: Punishment For Taarak And Friends
desc: Taarak tries to win Anjali's forgiveness with a heartfelt poem. Later, Anjali agrees to stay but sets a condition to punish Taarak and his friends. What will her punishment be?

name: Anjali Catches Hold Of Taarak
desc: Bhide tries to distract Anjali so that Taarak's food can be delivered. But just then, Anjali walks in while the delivery is taking place. Will Mission Masaledaar succeed or end in trouble?

name: Mission Masaledaar
desc: While Anjali visits Ratan and Roopa's house to prepare diet food, Jethalal and the others continue their Mission Masaledaar to help Taarak. Will their plan succeed?

name: Sunday Funday For Taarak
desc: All the men of the colony come together to secretly make Sunday a fun day for Taarak by getting him all his favourite food behind Anjali's back. Will their plan succeed?

name: Taarak Ki Peedha
desc: As Taarak gets ready to enjoy the delicious food sent by Jethalal, Anjali suddenly arrives at his office. Will Taarak get caught or manage to escape the situation?

name: Taarak Ka Khaana
desc: Taarak and his friends brainstorm ways to escape his healthy tiffin. Later, Jethalal deals with an unusual customer at his shop.

name: Taarak Ka Badhta Weight
desc: Anjali takes Dr. Hathi's advice to help Taarak reduce his weight. Later, the men of Gokuldham discuss Taarak's diet and fitness plan in their own amusing way as they try to come up with a plan to convince Anjali.

name: Taarak Gets Scolded
desc: Anjali scolds Taarak for eating outside food while she has prepared a healthy salad for him at home. How will Taarak manage to get out of this tricky situation?

name: Garba Ki Takkar
desc: The Garba competition continues in full swing as everyone showcases their best moves. Later, the winners are honored with a beautiful winning garland.

name: Garba Competition
desc: The Garba competition heats up as the members showcase their best moves and festive spirit. Who will emerge as the star performer?

name: Garba With A Twist
desc: Tapu Sena and the other members decorate the clubhouse beautifully for the Garba celebrations. As everyone gathers to play, who will steal the spotlight on the dance floor?

name: Roopa Aur Ratan Ka Surprise
desc: Ratan and Roopa go missing on the first day of Navratri, leaving everyone in the society worried and curious. Just as the celebration begins to feel incomplete, they arrive with a big surprise that leaves everyone stunned. What could it be?

name: Garba Ki Taiyyari
desc: Jethalal and the others enjoy practising garba in the shop, while the Mahila Mandal excitedly plans the upcoming Navratri celebrations. What surprises and fun moments await the Gokuldham residents this festive season?

name: Gada Electronics Ki Nayi Scheme
desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka excitedly wait to show Jethalal the new banner outside the shop. But will Jethalal appreciate their effort or end up scolding them instead?

name: Bhide Family Ki Khushi
desc: As Sonu's room gets painted with Asian Paints, Bhide and Madhvi decide to give their entire house a fresh new look. While the painting is underway, the Bhide family enjoys some much-needed relaxation time.

name: Room Painting Ki Tension
desc: Tapu Sena decides to help paint Sonu's room while Sonu considers cancelling her plan of calling her friend home. Later, Madhvi comes up with a solution. What is it?

name: Naya Painter
desc: Bhide hires a new painter for Sonu's room, but the painter dozes off before starting the work. How will Bhide get the room painted?

name: Painter Arrives At Bhide's House
desc: A Lucknowi painter arrives at Bhide's house to paint Sonu's room. Will he be of help or bring more trouble for the Bhide family?

name: Bhide Looks For A Painter
desc: Madhvi and Sonu clean up the mess made by Bhide and ask him to give up on painting Sonu's room himself. Later, Bhide starts looking for a painter.

name: Bhide Ka Confidence
desc: Bhide confidently assures Madhvi and Sonu that he will paint Sonu's room himself. But how will it actually turn out?

name: Bhide Seeks Jethalal's Help
desc: Disguised as a customer, a man tries to steal from Jethalal's shop but Bagha catches him. Later, Bhide asks Jethalal for help in buying wall paints.

name: Sonu's New Wall Paint
desc: Sonu scrapes the wall paint while cleaning before her friend's visit. How will Bhide react, and will he agree to get it repainted?

name: Veer Aur Bansri Ke Tuition Classes
desc: Tapu Sena learns the traditional steps of Garba, while Veer and Bansri head to Bhide's house for tuition. Will the class go smoothly?

name: Kaha Hai Pinku?
desc: The society members gather in the clubhouse and celebrate while waiting for Pinku. Just then, Gogi reveals that Pinku is not at home. Where could he be?

name: Pinku Ka Birthday
desc: Tapu Sena informs Bhide and the society members about Pinku's surprise birthday. As everyone gathers at the clubhouse, will Pinku arrive to be surprised?

name: Surprise Birthday Plan For Pinku
desc: Tapu Sena puts together a surprise birthday plan for Pinku, but Iyer walks in unexpectedly. Will their surprise still work out as planned?

name: Tapu Sena Ki Performance
desc: Taarak recites a poetry and after the elders, it is now time for the Tapu Sena to perform. Will everyone enjoy their act?

name: Rangaram Karyakaram
desc: As the Rangarang program begins, the members offer a heartfelt Ganesh Vandana in different languages and celebrate the event with joy.

name: Prayers And Prasad
desc: All the members offer their prayers and prasad before Bappa. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena takes on the task of distributing the prasad to those whose names are on the list.

name: Bappa Meets The Kids
desc: Moved by the devotion of Veer and Bansri, Lord Ganesh himself appears before them and assures them that he has accepted their laddoos. Later, the children gather everyone in the society compound.

name: Bachho Ki Aastha
desc: Veer and Bansri are deeply heartbroken after learning what the colony members have done. As the society leaves everything in Bappa's hands, how will the children be convinced?

name: Tapu Ka Idea
desc: The colony members eagerly wait for Tapu's idea to unfold so they can begin the Rangarang Program. During the aarti, the plan is set into motion. But will it be enough to convince the kids?

name: Champaklal Ki Koshish
desc: Champaklal tries to convince the children to eat and drop their stubbornness. But just then, another problem arises. How will the society handle it?

name: Ratan Aur Rupa Ki Badhti Pareshani
desc: Tensions rise as devotees begin complaining about not receiving the prasad. Later, Bhide is called in to resolve the matter. How will Gokuldham Society handle this situation?
